message:
feat(tui): implement ATC dashboard screen with agent/decision/detail panels

Add the Air Traffic Controller dashboard screen to the TUI:

New file (tui_screens/atc.rs):
- AtcScreen with ftui widget imports, ATC summary/snapshot types
- Constants for refresh cadence, max visible decisions, agent table
  sort columns
- Focus panels: agents list, decisions list, detail panel

Wiring:
- tui_app.rs: add Atc to screen_tick_key, screen factory, palette
  actions, COACH_HINTS (usage tip)
- tui_chrome.rs: airplane icon for ATC tab, bump screen count 15->16
- tui_focus.rs: ATC_FOCUS with 3 focus nodes and layout coordinates
- tui_screens/mod.rs: update count assertions, add jump key '^' test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
